use serde::Deserialize;

// BAD: owned String fields for large readonly payload
#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct ApiResponse {
    id: String,
    name: String,
    description: String,
    tags: Vec<String>,
    metadata: String,
}

#[derive(Deserialize)]
struct EventPayload {
    event_type: String,
    source: String,
    data: String,
    timestamp: String,
}

fn process_response(json: &str) -> Result<ApiResponse, Error> {
    let response: ApiResponse = serde_json::from_str(json)?;
    // Only reads the data, never modifies
    println!("{}: {}", response.name, response.description);
    Ok(response)
}
